name: @cheshire/solana-agent-trust
description: Anchor program for Solana-native reputation and validation records for MPL Core Cheshire agent identities (not deployed; placeholder program id).

scripts.check:structure: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); for (const f of ['README.md','Anchor.toml','Cargo.toml','programs/cheshire-agent-trust/src/lib.rs']) { if (!fs.existsSync(f)) { console.error('missing', f); process.exit(1);} } console.log('ok');"
